note: Native task tools are unavailable in this environment; this file is the cross-session resume record. Full step-by-step code lives in the plan .md. Resume via /superpowers-extended-cc:executing-plans docs/superpowers/plans/2026-06-20-cc-orchestra.md

tasks.subject: Task 0: Project scaffold
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Building, vetted Go module skeleton with CI and lint config.

**Files:** go.mod, Makefile, .golangci.yml, .github/workflows/ci.yml, README.md, cmd/cc-orchestra/main.go

**Verify:** `go build ./... && go vet ./...` exits 0.

```json:metadata
{"files":["go.mod","Makefile",".golangci.yml",".github/workflows/ci.yml","README.md","cmd/cc-orchestra/main.go"],"verifyCommand":"go build ./... && go vet ./...","acceptanceCriteria":["go build ./... succeeds","go vet ./... clean","binary prints cc-orchestra <version>"],"modelTier":"mechanical"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 1: Session core types and formatting
tasks.description:
**Goal:** session.Session value type + display helpers (Name, Glyph, StatusText, Age, Basename, sanitize/truncate).

**Files:** internal/session/session.go, internal/session/session_test.go

**Verify:** `go test ./internal/session/ -run 'TestName|TestGlyph|TestStatusText|TestAge|TestSanitize' -v`

```json:metadata
{"files":["internal/session/session.go","internal/session/session_test.go"],"verifyCommand":"go test ./internal/session/ -v","acceptanceCriteria":["Status ordered NotRunning<Idle<Busy","Name resolves display→firstmsg→project→shortUUID","Glyph/StatusText/Age correct"],"modelTier":"standard"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Merge and sort
tasks.description:
**Goal:** session.Merge unifies transcripts + live agents + registry meta into a sorted []Session; derives busy/idle from mtime freshness (BusyThreshold).

**Files:** internal/session/merge.go, internal/session/merge_test.go

**Verify:** `go test ./internal/session/ -run TestMerge -v`

```json:metadata
{"files":["internal/session/merge.go","internal/session/merge_test.go"],"verifyCommand":"go test ./internal/session/ -run TestMerge -v","acceptanceCriteria":["transcript-only=NotRunning","running+fresh mtime=Busy, stale=Idle","live-only takes cwd from agent","meta applies pin/archive/name","sort pinned>busy>idle>notrunning then lastactive desc","registry-only orphans not surfaced"],"modelTier":"standard"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: Source paths
tasks.description:
**Goal:** ProjectsRoot (honors CLAUDE_CONFIG_DIR else ~/.claude/projects) + DecodeProjectDir fallback.

**Files:** internal/sources/paths.go, internal/sources/paths_test.go

**Verify:** `go test ./internal/sources/ -run TestPaths -v`

```json:metadata
{"files":["internal/sources/paths.go","internal/sources/paths_test.go"],"verifyCommand":"go test ./internal/sources/ -run TestPaths -v","acceptanceCriteria":["ProjectsRoot honors CLAUDE_CONFIG_DIR","DecodeProjectDir reconstructs lossy path"],"modelTier":"mechanical"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: Transcript scanning
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Scan projects root → one TranscriptInfo per non-sidechain transcript (cwd, gitBranch, first real user message, mtime, uuid).

**Files:** internal/sources/transcripts.go, internal/sources/transcripts_test.go

**Verify:** `go test ./internal/sources/ -run TestScan -v`

```json:metadata
{"files":["internal/sources/transcripts.go","internal/sources/transcripts_test.go"],"verifyCommand":"go test ./internal/sources/ -run TestScan -v","acceptanceCriteria":["missing root returns (nil,nil)","skips isSidechain and non-jsonl","first user msg skips meta/tool-result lines","cwd/gitBranch/mtime/uuid populated","malformed lines skipped"],"modelTier":"standard"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 5: Live agents source
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Run `claude agents --json` behind an injectable Runner; parse {pid,cwd,kind,startedAt,sessionId} into []session.LiveInfo.

**Files:** internal/sources/agents.go, internal/sources/agents_test.go

**Verify:** `go test ./internal/sources/ -run TestAgents -v`

```json:metadata
{"files":["internal/sources/agents.go","internal/sources/agents_test.go"],"verifyCommand":"go test ./internal/sources/ -run TestAgents -v","acceptanceCriteria":["parses agent fields incl StartedAt=UnixMilli","empty output yields empty slice","runner error propagates","DefaultRunner returns ErrClaudeNotFound when absent"],"modelTier":"standard"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 6: Registry persistence
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Load/Save registry with atomic writes + corrupt recovery; Metas() → map[uuid]session.Meta; Update mutator stamps UpdatedAt.

**Files:** internal/registry/registry.go, internal/registry/registry_test.go

**Verify:** `go test ./internal/registry/ -v`

```json:metadata
{"files":["internal/registry/registry.go","internal/registry/registry_test.go"],"verifyCommand":"go test ./internal/registry/ -v","acceptanceCriteria":["missing file → empty registry v1","save/load round-trips, no tmp left","corrupt file → empty + backup","Update persists + stamps UpdatedAt","DefaultPath honors XDG_STATE_HOME"],"modelTier":"standard"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 7: TUI core — list, navigation, refresh
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Bubble Tea Model rendering the fleet as a navigable scrolling list; archived toggle A; refresh r; quit q. Mode behaviors stubbed for later tasks.

**Files:** internal/tui/keys.go, internal/tui/model.go, internal/tui/view.go, internal/tui/model_test.go (adds bubbletea/bubbles/lipgloss deps)

**Verify:** `go test ./internal/tui/ -run 'TestNav|TestArchived|TestQuit' -v`

```json:metadata
{"files":["internal/tui/keys.go","internal/tui/model.go","internal/tui/view.go","internal/tui/model_test.go","go.mod","go.sum"],"verifyCommand":"go test ./internal/tui/ -v","acceptanceCriteria":["Init loads fleet via fleetMsg","archived hidden until A","j/k move + scroll","q returns tea.Quit","View renders header/rows/footer"],"modelTier":"standard"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 8: Filter mode
tasks.description:
**Goal:** / enters filter; fuzzy subsequence over name|project|firstmsg; enter keeps, esc clears. Replaces applyVisible/startFilter/updateFilter stubs; updates renderHeader.

**Files:** internal/tui/model.go, internal/tui/view.go, internal/tui/filter_test.go

**Verify:** `go test ./internal/tui/ -run TestFilter -v`

```json:metadata
{"files":["internal/tui/model.go","internal/tui/view.go","internal/tui/filter_test.go"],"verifyCommand":"go test ./internal/tui/ -run TestFilter -v","acceptanceCriteria":["non-empty filter narrows to subsequence matches","esc clears, enter keeps + exits input","header shows filter input"],"modelTier":"standard"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 9: Preview pane with debounced lazy load
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Detail pane for selection; sources.LoadDetail extracts model/usage/last msgs; 150ms tea.Tick debounce; ignore stale ticks.

**Files:** internal/session/session.go (Detail), internal/sources/detail.go, internal/sources/detail_test.go, internal/tui/model.go, internal/tui/view.go, internal/tui/preview_test.go

**Verify:** `go test ./internal/sources/ -run TestLoadDetail -v && go test ./internal/tui/ -run TestPreview -v`

```json:metadata
{"files":["internal/session/session.go","internal/sources/detail.go","internal/sources/detail_test.go","internal/tui/model.go","internal/tui/view.go","internal/tui/preview_test.go"],"verifyCommand":"go test ./internal/sources/ ./internal/tui/ -v","acceptanceCriteria":["LoadDetail extracts model/usage/last user+assistant","cursor move schedules debounced load","stale tick ignored","preview renders for selection"],"modelTier":"standard"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 10: Registry actions — rename, pin, archive
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Wire n/p/a to mutate registry, persist atomically, refresh. Replaces startRename/updateRename/togglePin/toggleArchive stubs; rename prompt in header.

**Files:** internal/tui/model.go, internal/tui/view.go, internal/tui/actions_test.go

**Verify:** `go test ./internal/tui/ -run TestActions -v`

```json:metadata
{"files":["internal/tui/model.go","internal/tui/view.go","internal/tui/actions_test.go"],"verifyCommand":"go test ./internal/tui/ -run TestActions -v","acceptanceCriteria":["p toggles Pinned + persists","a toggles Archived","n prompt saves DisplayName, esc cancels","mutation triggers reload"],"modelTier":"standard"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 11: Hand-off and open-in-editor
tasks.description:
**Goal:** enter suspends TUI + runs `claude --resume <uuid>` via tea.ExecProcess (resume on exit); o opens transcript in $EDITOR. Replaces doHandoff/openEditor stubs; handoffDoneMsg case.

**Files:** internal/tui/handoff.go, internal/tui/model.go, internal/tui/handoff_test.go

**Verify:** `go test ./internal/tui/ -run TestHandoff -v`

```json:metadata
{"files":["internal/tui/handoff.go","internal/tui/model.go","internal/tui/handoff_test.go"],"verifyCommand":"go test ./internal/tui/ -run TestHandoff -v","acceptanceCriteria":["ExecHandoff.Run returns ExecProcess cmd or handoffDoneMsg{err} if claude absent","enter invokes handoff with selected uuid","refresh after process returns","o runs $EDITOR (default vi)"],"modelTier":"standard"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 12: Live polling
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Auto-refresh fleet every 3s. Replaces Init (batch refresh+ticker); adds tickMsg type + case + tickEvery.

**Files:** internal/tui/model.go, internal/tui/poll_test.go

**Verify:** `go test ./internal/tui/ -run TestPoll -v`

```json:metadata
{"files":["internal/tui/model.go","internal/tui/poll_test.go"],"verifyCommand":"go test ./internal/tui/ -run TestPoll -v","acceptanceCriteria":["Init starts initial load + 3s ticker","tickMsg refreshes and re-arms"],"modelTier":"standard"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 13: main wiring, error handling, README
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Assemble sources+registry+TUI in main.go; degrade when claude missing or agents call fails; finalize README. Runnable binary.

**Files:** cmd/cc-orchestra/main.go, internal/tui/model.go (WithBanner), README.md

**Verify:** `go build ./... && go vet ./... && go test ./...` then `./bin/cc-orchestra` (manual).

```json:metadata
{"files":["cmd/cc-orchestra/main.go","internal/tui/model.go","README.md"],"verifyCommand":"go build ./... && go vet ./... && go test ./...","acceptanceCriteria":["launches TUI listing on-disk sessions","claude-missing → transcripts + banner, no crash","agents error → still renders from transcripts","build/vet/test green"],"modelTier":"standard"}
```
